title: astragalus compositus
intro: Astragalus compositus, also known as Mongolian milkvetch, is a perennial legume plant native to the mountainous regions of China, Mongolia, and Russia. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as enhancing immune function, reducing fatigue, and improving cardiovascular health. Astragalus compositus is often prepared as a decoction, capsule, or tincture, and is also used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine.
